baseline_real_run_log.notes: Contains the partial baseline smoke benchmark that ran on A100 before the PaLU load step.

baseline_real_run_err.notes: Contains the stderr stream for the same A100 run, including the subsequent PaLU failure traceback.

palu_attempt_log.notes: Shows the run advanced into 'Loading PaLU Model' after the baseline benchmark.

palu_attempt_err.notes: Records the FileNotFoundError caused by the historical absolute PaLU path.

checkpoint_build_summary.notes: Repo-local PaLU checkpoint build metadata created after the path fix work.

latency_comparison_summary.notes: Normalizes the currently available PaLU baseline / unaligned / aligned latency evidence into one comparison-shaped summary, explicitly marking which entries are still missing.

paper_a100_sources.notes: Checked-in paper table with A100 baseline/ASVD/LLM-Pruner latency numbers.
Checked-in slide table with A100 prefill/decode summary.
